title: taraxacum subalatum
intro: Taraxacum subalatum, also known as the alpine dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to high-altitude mountain regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum subalatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
